name: Sopa De Frijol Negro (Cuban Black Bean Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cooked smoked ham, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and garlic. Cook until the onions are tender.
2. Drain and rinse the dried black beans. In the same pot, add the beef broth, water, smoked ham, green pepper, and chopped tomato. Stir to combine.
3. Sprinkle in the dark rum, ground cumin, and dried oregano. Stir to mix.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil. Once boiling, reduce the heat to maintain a gentle simmer.
5. Cover and let the soup simmer until the beans are tender, approximately 2 hours.
6. Just before serving, stir in the chopped hard-cooked eggs and additional chopped onions.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot.
